spec.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && valid(tensor) && size > 0 && alloc->alignment > 0 && alloc->max_chunk_size > 0 && alloc->max_chunk_size <= SIZE_MAX/2 && alloc->n_chunks >= 0 && alloc->n_chunks < MAX_CHUNKS && (forall i: 0 <= i < alloc->n_chunks ==> valid(alloc->chunks[i]) && alloc->chunks[i]->n_free_blocks >= 0 && alloc->chunks[i]->max_size >= 0) && size <= SIZE_MAX - alloc->alignment && !overflow(aligned_offset(NULL, size, alloc->alignment))
spec.postcondition: (ensures valid(result.chunk) && result.chunk >= 0 && result.chunk < alloc->n_chunks && result.offset >= 0 && result.offset < alloc->chunks[result.chunk]->max_size && (result represents a valid allocation of aligned_offset(NULL, size, alloc->alignment) bytes from alloc that can be assigned to tensor address) && alloc->chunks[result.chunk]->max_size >= result.offset + aligned_offset(NULL, size, alloc->alignment)) && (result.chunk >= 0 && result.chunk < alloc->n_chunks && result.offset >= 0 && alloc->chunks[result.chunk]->max_size >= result.offset + aligned_offset(NULL, size, alloc->alignment))
